name: Shanks

Furthermore, he is Monkey D. Luffy's childhood hero. He was raised by his master, All For One, with the goal of killing All Might, and ultimately destroying the society he represents. Tomura is a very twisted, malevolent, and maliciously warped young man, who is considered to be the polar opposite of Izuku Midoriya. name: Asa Mitaka

He is the twin big brother of [Ruby Hoshino](https://anilist.co/character/183884/Ruby-Hoshino). ~!He was previously a doctor named Goro, who became a fan of Ai through his patient named Sarina.!~ ~!After reincarnating as Aquamarine and witnessing Ai's murder, he is intent on plotting revenge to the person who schemed Ai's death.!~

description: __Height:__ 180 cm (5' 11") Vash is an outlaw, commonly referred to as "The Humanoid Typhoon" due to the carnage and destruction left in his wake. Feared as a ruthless desperado, Vash is actually a man who hates violence and would much rather spread his message of "LOVE AND PEACE!"

name: Punpun Onodera
description: Punpun is a socially awkward young boy whose age of innocence ends with his parents' divorce. As he continues to mature and interact with people around him as the average boy would, such as dealing with crushes and getting into mischief with his classmates, he begins to learn how crushing and harsh reality can be and struggles to find his purpose in the world. ~!As Punpun grows older, his appearance changes drastically based on how he views himself. !~

name: Shinoa Hiiragi
description: __Height:__ 150 cm (4'11") Shinoa Hiiragi is Guren's sergeant and one of the squad leaders of the Moon Demon Company. She is appointed to supervise Yuuichirou during his suspension from the Japanese Imperial Demon Army for his reckless behavior. She is sarcastic and enjoys teasing others, especially Yuuichirou. name: Ryuunosuke Akutagawa
description: __Height:__ 172cm (5'8") __Likes:__ Curios and antiques, tea, figs __Dislikes:__ Bonsai trees, dogs, baths "The weak will die. Die, and make way for others." A member of the notorious "Port Mafia" that operates by the harbor. Akutagawa has a black and white "survival of the fittest" view of the world, claiming that weak people should die and give way to the stronger ones. His ability is called "Rashōmon" (羅生門). He is not afraid of pain and defeat, if only to hear a word from a "certain person".

name: Stark
description: Stark is a warrior who fights alongside [Frieren](https://anilist.co/character/176754/Frieren) and [Fern](https://anilist.co/character/183965/Fern). After his village was attacked by demons, he fled and became [Eisen](https://anilist.co/character/184312/Eisen)'s apprentice. At Eisen's instruction, he joined Frieren's party as their vanguard.

name: Tohru

name: Gen Asagiri
description: __Height:__ 175 cm (5'9") Gen Asagiri is an enemy turned ally of Senku. Originally de-petrified by Tsukasa Shishio, he was sent to find Senku, only to defect to the Kingdom of Science. Gen later becomes one of the Five Wise Generals. He is somewhat full of himself and his abilities, taking pride in his status as a magician and a mentalist, along with his knowledge of the human psyche. name: Kaworu Nagisa
description: __Relations:__ Shinji Ikari (romantic interest) ~!Kaworu Nagisa is both the 17th Angel and the Fifth Child. Although classified as an Angel, Kaworu is similar to Rei Ayanami in being a Seed of Life that inhabits a human body. Despite his human form, Kaworu does not consider himself to be human, since he refers to humans as "the Lilin".!~
